<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Gathering more items for the audit.

Nine audit areas identified: Hugo module config, call-to-action partial usage, themeGenerator.js size, notes-random script loading, lint overlaps, unused go.mod modules, disabled GitHub workflow, deployBuild complexity, and tailwind-bootstrap-grid usage. July 17 audit will be reviewed for comparison.

Two major candidates for removal stand out. The randomizer-maintain.py script spans roughly 1,981 lines and duplicates data already stored in data/randomizer.yaml; it could be shrunk by moving inline prompt data into YAML files. Swiper and glightbox are loaded site-wide via hugo.toml at roughly 12,700 lines, yet they appear to be used only on two pages.

The notes-graph.js file is 1,534 lines and depends on pixi.js. It may be used only on the graph page. Native canvas or SVG could replace it. It is actively used for the notes graph.

Several one-shot migration scripts in the scripts/ root total roughly 1,952 lines. They can be archived after migrations finish.

The scripts/archive directory holds about 2,540 lines. It is already archived but remains in the repository. Git history could replace it.

Orphaned Hugoplate partials—banner, features, testimonials, home-proof, blog-list, and call-to-action—total roughly 182 lines plus content. Nothing uses them.

google-map.js is 179 lines and only used on the contact page. An iframe embed could replace it.

The three voice linters—garden-voice-lint, notes-voice-lint, slop-lint, and notes-voice-sanitize—combine to over 730 lines. Their lint:garden checks overlap heavily. They should merge into a single linter.

assets/js/notes-random.js is 1,070 lines. It loads on the notes list, create, random-duo, and unrelated notes pages. It shares helpers with the offline randomizer generator and contains overlapping logic.

scripts/okf-viz is roughly 1,031 lines and appears redundant because export-okf-bundle already generates it.

assets/js/search.js is 527 lines and largely duplicates search-core.js, which is only 83 lines. The vendor duplication could be trimmed.

layouts/_partials/essentials/script.html overrides the theme version of script.html with search-core fingerprint handling.

The language-switcher is inactive. disableLanguages is empty and only English is enabled.

The language-switcher partial still renders in the header, adding roughly 34 lines plus its call.

static/admin and functions/api likely hold unused TinaCMS remnants.

blog_frontmatter.py and normalize-blog-frontmatter.py may overlap.

content/english/sections/testimonial.md and call-to-action.md are leftover Hugoplate files.

improve-blog-slugs.py reimplements frontmatter splitting locally rather than importing notes_content.

data/garden-voice-finish.yaml and garden-voice-migrate-data.py and garden-voice-finish.py are migration leftovers that should be deleted.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Reading the default module configuration.

Auditing additional components: notes list script overhead, Pixi replacement feasibility, voice lint overlap, blog frontmatter usage, and blog slug improvements. The largest candidate for removal is `randomizer-maintain.py` (~1800 lines of inline prompt strings), since its data already lives in `randomizer.yaml` (~2850 lines).

Swiper and Glightbox load site-wide despite only three pages using their shortcodes. A per-page conditional load would cut the ~12.7k line bundle significantly.

Another ~1952-line batch of one-shot migration scripts in the root `scripts/` folder can be deleted. The `scripts/archive` directory (~2540 lines) is already archived and redundant.

The notes force graph is the heaviest runtime dependency at roughly 1534 lines of JavaScript plus the Pixi library. Replacing it with native Canvas 2D or SVG would be a product-level choice rather than a simple refactor.

Orphaned Hugoplate partials totaling roughly 182 lines can be removed.

Voice linting is triple-overlapping across garden-voice-lint, notes-voice-lint, slop-lint, and notes-voice-sanitize. These six scripts under lint:garden should merge into one.

The okf-viz maintainer bundle is a 1031-line generated artifact that could be simplified.

notes-random.js is 1070 lines and loads on notes list, create, and random pages. Splitting it so only the list page gets shuffle UI would remove heavy duo and graph logic from the other two.

google-map.js is 179 lines and only used on the cact page.

The language-switcher is still in the header even though the site is single-language.

font-awesome remains in module.toml even though it is unused.

Duplicate essentials partials exist in both layouts/_partials/essentials and themes, splitting script.html and search handling.

The disabled GitHub workflow file can be deleted.

functions/api contains 167 lines of unused Tina remnants.

search.js is 527 lines and mostly vendor UI; trimming it would help if modal features are unused.

improve-blog-slugs.py reimplements split_frontmatter from stdlib.

garden-voice migration leftovers include garden-voice-migrate.py, garden-voice-finish.py, garden-voice-migrate-data.py, and data/garden-voice-finish.yaml.

content/english/sections/testimonial.md is a Hugoplate demo file that can be deleted.

The specs/001-site-search directory holds two spec files that can be deleted once the implementation is complete.

Many scan aliases in package.json run lint scripts concurrently.

assets/js/randomizer.js embeds an offline HTML generator and 634 lines of inline CSS strings.

Checking whether mermaid and preloader are actually used.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The CMS stack is intentional for Sveltia. It will only be flagged as YAGNI if editing is strictly git-only.

A dead module import remains in the base template despite the disabled preloader. Swiper and Glightbox are loaded globally across all pages but only used on three demo pages. Moving them to conditional per-page loads would yield the biggest visitor-facing savings.

A randomizer script duplicates prompt data into a YAML file. Editing the YAML directly would remove roughly 4,800 lines of redundant maintenance.

One-shot migration scripts in the root `scripts/` folder total about 1,952 lines. They can be archived or kept only in git history.

The `scripts/archive/` directory holds roughly 2,540 lines. It belongs in git history alone.

Native `pixi.js` and `notes-graph.js` add 1,534 lines. Replacing them with a lighter graph library or Canvas2D/SVG force layout would remove one npm dependency. This is a valid core-feature finding.

Orphan Hugoplate marketing partials total 182 lines plus two markdown files. They can be deleted.

Seven overlapping voice linter aliases and scripts can collapse into a single `lint-voice.py` with a shared rules YAML.

The `okf-viz/` directory holds roughly 1,031 lines of maintainer HTML visualization. `export-okf-bundle` already generates this on demand, so the static copy can be removed.

`notes-random.js` is 1,070 lines and loads on every notes list page. Only its core shuffle logic is needed there; the rest belongs to the duo and graph prompt builders.

Unused Hugo modules remain in the imports. Font-awesome is unnecessary because the site uses `data/icons.json`. Preloader is disabled. Adsense may be unused if its placeholder is empty. Mermaid is still required for elements and the blog template.

`google-map.js` is 179 lines for a contact page that could use a Google Maps iframe instead.

The language-switcher partial is 34 lines for a single-language site.

`assets/js/search.js` is 527 lines. It duplicates vendor modal UI. It should shrink to rank-delta logic over the 83-line core search script.

Disabled CI workflows such as `.github/workflows/main.yml.disabled` should be deleted.

Garden-voice migration leftovers total roughly 424 lines across four files. They can be removed.

One-shot scripts `improve-blog-slugs.py`, `blog-de-slop.py`, and `build-grade1-math-quiz.py` are unused and should be deleted.

Root `layouts/` overrides the theme. The `script.html` divergence between them could be consolidated.

`randomizer.js` is 634 lines of inline offline HTML generation. It should become a separate template or disappear if offline export is unused.

`specs/001-site-search/` is a small leftover to delete.

`improve-blog-slugs.py` hand-rolls frontmatter splitting that `notes_content.split_frontmatter` already handles.

`__blog-template.md` and `__`-prefixed drafts are not over-engineered.

The `lint:garden` alias chains six scripts. That is orchestration bloat.

`touch-controls.js`, `scroll-progress.js`, `toc.js`, and `back-to-top.js` are all global. They are smaller cuts.

A duplicate Swiper copy exists inside `themes/jorap/plugins` and again in the `_vendor/gallery-slider` module, creating a triple copy. The net line estimate for deletions and shrinks is roughly 7,000 lines.

Conservative deletable lines total roughly 8,341. Aggressively removing Swiper and Glightbox from the repository adds another 12,700 lines. Combined, the net estimate reaches about 21,000 lines. Vendor dependencies such as pixi.js, tailwind-bootstrap-grid, font-awesome, and preloader may also be removable.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The Google Maps JavaScript is disabled and not loading. However, the 179-line plugin file and API key in params.toml remain in the repository as unused dead weight.

The Mailchimp subscription block on the contact page is also disabled and unused. The notes-random.js script is a major performance issue, loading 1070 lines on every notes list page visit. I am now tallying remaining one-shot scripts outside the archive to finalize the net calculation.

The audit now covers additional dead weight. Swiper plugins total 12,700 lines. The custom.css monolith is 2,441 lines; shrinking it is preferable to deleting it entirely. Notes-graph and Pixi are active features, so they cannot be removed without replacement. Voice lint overlap spans roughly 833 lines across four scripts. Language-switcher adds 34 lines. Home proof partials and parameters add about 42 lines. Slop-lint contributes 358 lines. Most other items are minor.

A conservative estimate places the total dead weight near 9,600 lines. Adding the vendored Swiper and Glightbox libraries brings the subtotal to roughly 22,300 lines.

The randomizer YAML is 2,850 lines. It duplicates the randomizer-maintain.py script. Glightbox is also in the global lazy bundle. Blog_frontmatter.py is a shared library and should stay. The CMS stack is intentional for Sveltia. Yagni applies only if the site is git-only.

2. `delete` `scripts/archive/` completed one-shot migrations (~2,540 lines). Git history. [`scripts/archive/`]
3. `shrink` `assets/css/custom.css` monolith (2,441 lines). Split by route/feature; drop dead rules. [`assets/css/custom.css`]
4. `delete` Finished migration scripts still in `scripts/` root (~1,950 lines): `apply-wider-levels-batch*.py`, `fix-shareable-thought.py`, `bulletize-key-concepts.py`, `strip-desc-from-key-concept.py`, `split-key-concept-bullets.py`, `improve-blog-slugs.py`, `blog-de-slop.py`, `build-grade1-math-quiz.py`. Archive or delete. [`scripts/`]
5. `delete` `scripts/randomizer-maintain.py` (~1,981 lines) with prompts also in `data/randomizer.yaml` (~2,850 lines) — dual source of truth. Edit YAML; keep a tiny validator. [`scripts/randomizer-maintain.py`, `data/randomizer.yaml`]
6. `delete` Dead Hugoplate home sections never wired in `home.html`: banner, features, testimonials, home-proof (~146 lines). Nothing. [`themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/sections/{banner,features,testimonials,home-proof}.html`]
7. `delete` `call-to-action` partial + section content — zero `partial` references in live layouts. Nothing. [`themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/call-to-action.html`, `content/english/sections/call-to-action.md`]
8. `yagni` Four overlapping voice linters (~900 lines): `garden-voice-lint.py`, `notes-voice-lint.py`, `slop-lint.py`, `notes-voice-sanitize.py` + 7 `lint:*` scan aliases in `package.json`. One linter with `--garden` / `--blog` flags. [`scripts/`, `package.json`]
9. `delete` `scripts/okf-viz/` local dev viz (~1,031 lines). `export-okf-bundle.py` already generates viz on export. [`scripts/okf-viz/`]
10. `yagni` `notes-random.js` (1,070 lines) loaded on `/notes/` list, create, duo, and unrelated panels — most of it is duo/graph/prompt logic. Split a ~150-line shuffle core for list pages. [`assets/js/notes-random.js`, `layouts/notes/list.html`]
11. `native` `pixi.js` npm dep — sole consumer is `notes-graph.js` (1,534 lines). Canvas 2D or SVG force layout. [`assets/js/notes-graph.js`, `package.json`]
12. `delete` Hugo module imports with no live content: **adsense** (empty `google_adsense`), **mermaid** (only `elements.md` + drafts), **modal** (zero shortcode use), **font-awesome** (site uses `data/icons.json`). Remove `[[imports]]`. [`config/_default/module.toml`]
13. `delete` `google-map.js` (179 lines) + stale API key in params — `google_map.enable = false`, contact template already guards load. Nothing or Maps iframe embed. [`themes/jorap/assets/plugins/maps/google-map.js`, `config/_default/params.toml`]
14. `delete` Garden-voice migration leftovers (~425 lines): `garden-voice-migrate.py`, `garden-voice-finish.py`, `garden-voice-migrate-data.py`, `data/garden-voice-finish.yaml`. Archive. [`scripts/garden-voice-*.py`, `data/garden-voice-finish.yaml`]
15. `delete` Hugoplate demo authors (john-doe, sam-wilson, william-jacob) — live posts use `author: "JoRap"` string, not these pages. Nothing. [`content/english/authors/`, `themes/jorap/layouts/authors/`]
16. `delete` `content/english/pages/elements.md` (258 lines) — menu link commented out; only reason Swiper/Glightbox/accordion/tab modules stay globally loaded. Nothing or fold into theme-review. [`content/english/pages/elements.md`, `config/_default/menus.en.toml`]
17. `yagni` Language switcher with one language (`disableLanguages = []`, `defaultContentLanguageInSubdir = false`). Nothing. [`layouts/_partials/essentials/header.html`, `themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/components/language-switcher.html`]
18. `delete` `home_proof` partial (27 lines) + params block — partial never included from `home.html`. Nothing. [`themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/sections/home-proof.html`, `config/_default/params.toml`]
19. `delete` Disabled-feature wiring still called from `baseof.html` / `script.html`: preloader (`enable = false`), announcement, cookie consent, adsense partial, GTM placeholder (`G-MEASUREMENT_ID`). Guard calls or drop imports. [`layouts/baseof.html`, `config/_default/module.toml`, `config/_default/params.toml`]
20. `yagni` CMS stack (~1,240 lines) if you only edit via git — `static/admin/`, `functions/api/`, `docs/CMS_SETUP.md`. Keep if Sveltia at `/admin/` is live. [`static/admin/`, `functions/api/`]
21. `shrink` `assets/js/search.js` (527 lines) vs `search-core.js` (83 lines) — vendor modal UI fork; keep rank delta + thin UI shell. [`assets/js/search.js`]

24. `delete` `.github/workflows/main.yml.disabled` (90 lines). Nothing. [`.github/workflows/main.yml.disabled`]
25. `yagni` Duplicate `layouts/` vs `themes/jorap/layouts/` essentials (header, baseof, script) — production uses root overrides; theme copies are drift surface. One source. [`layouts/_partials/essentials/`, `themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/essentials/`]
26. `shrink` Identical `build` and `deploy` npm scripts. One script; alias the other. [`package.json`]

**Keep** (not over-engineering): `deployBuild.mjs` + `cspHashes.mjs`, `spawnUtil.mjs`, `themeGenerator.js`, `noteFileDates.js`, `search-core.js` + `test-search.mjs`, `notes_content.py` shared lib, `blog_frontmatter.py` (used by normalize/export), core notes partials (`assembled-content`, `link-registry`, `resolve-target`).

**net: ~-18,500 lines possible, -1 to -2 npm deps (`pixi.js`, optionally `tailwind-bootstrap-grid`), -4 to -6 Hugo module imports.**

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
A pragmatic lazy approach is being considered for the voice lint merge.

A unified CLI for voice-lint.py was drafted with flags for garden, site, dashes, and slop. The audit requires merging everything into a single linter. Concatenating all logic into one file would be too large. Subprocess calls would not reduce lines. Importing from separate modules would still leave multiple files.

The laziest viable path is a single `scripts/voice-lint.py` using argparse subcommands. Existing scan functions would be exported from the current files, then imported by the new script. The standalone `if __name__` entry points would be removed.

Subprocessing the old scripts was rejected because it does not cut files. The user wants real cuts. Item #8 will inline the garden-voice-lint scan from garden_voice_rules and the notes-voice-lint scan from notes_voice into the new unified script.

The dash sanitizer and slop lint logic will also be pulled into the unified script. Rather than creating a separate library module, existing Python files will remain as internal modules under `scripts/voice_lint/` and be imported directly. The new `voice-lint.py` will expose garden, site, dashes, and slop modes via argparse, plus flags for blog-only, notes-only, summary, and check.

Each existing script will be refactored to expose a `run(argv)` function returning an integer exit code. The unified `voice-lint.py` will dispatch to these functions. Old standalone scripts will be deleted and `package.json` updated accordingly.

For the notes-random split, five new JavaScript files are planned: `notes-random-core.js`, `notes-random-select.js`, `notes-random-featured.js`, `notes-random-single.js`, and `notes-random-duo.js`.

The notes-random split must preserve plain script semantics. Since Hugo loads these as plain scripts rather than ES modules, the five new files will be loaded as separate script tags in order. The list page only needs core.js and featured.js for its featured block. Need to verify whether list.html actually includes that partial.
</details></think>

Merging duplicate `.randomizer-play__back` CSS blocks in `custom.css` and scanning for other duplicate selectors. Checking whether randomizer styles overlap between inline JavaScript and external CSS. Removing the five theme essentials partials listed under #25.

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
src = Path("assets/js/notes-random.js").read_text()
# Split points by IIFE comments
parts = {
    "notes-random-core.js": src.split("/**\n * Shared note picker")[0].rstrip() + "\n",
}
rest = src.split("/**\n * Shared note picker")[1]
parts["notes-random-select.js"] = "/**\n * Shared note picker" + rest.split("/**\n * Notes home:")[0].rstrip() + "\n"
rest2 = rest.split("/**\n * Notes home:")[1]
parts["notes-random-featured.js"] = "/**\n * Notes home:" + rest2.split("/**\n * Blog post or note page:")[0].rstrip() + "\n"
rest3 = rest2.split("/**\n * Blog post or note page:")[1]
parts["notes-random-single.js"] = "/**\n * Blog post or note page:" + rest3.split("/**\n * Random Duo page:")[0].rstrip() + "\n"
parts["notes-random-duo.js"] = "/**\n * Random Duo page:" + rest3.split("/**\n * Random Duo page:")[1].rstrip() + "\n"
for name, body in parts.items():
    Path(f"assets/js/{name}").write_text(body)
    print(name, len(body.splitlines()))
PY
```

_**Agent (auto-low)**_

Applied all 14 audit items. Summary:

### Deleted (~7,500+ lines)
- **`scripts/archive/`**, one-shot migration scripts, **`scripts/okf-viz/`**, garden-voice migration files, **`scripts/randomizer-maintain.py`**, **`.github/workflows/main.yml.disabled`**
- **Theme duplicate essentials** (`header`, `footer`, `script`, `style`, `self-hosted-fonts`) — site `layouts/_partials/essentials/` is the single source

### Added / replaced
- **`scripts/lint-randomizer.py`** — validates `data/randomizer.yaml` (edit YAML directly; `pnpm lint:randomizer`)
- **`scripts/voice-lint.py`** — unified entry: `garden | site | dashes | slop` (implementation modules kept; `package.json` lint scripts point here)
- **`assets/js/notes-random-*.js`** — split into core / select / featured / single / duo; removed monolithic `notes-random.js`

### Per-page JS loading (#10)
| Page | Scripts |
|------|---------|
| `/notes/` list | `core` + `featured` only (~580 lines vs 1,070) |
| Note/blog random panel | `core` + `select` + `single` |
| Random duo | `core` + `select` + `duo` |
| Note creator | removed dead `notes-random.js` load |

### Shrinks (#3, #21, #22)

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Reading the rest of the file to understand how Hugo resolves CSS paths.

Hugo's module merge will prioritize the site's custom.css over the theme version. Splitting it into route-specific files under assets/css/ would require updating main.css imports and style.html for conditional loading. The user suggested this as a follow-up.

The ponytail audit recommends splitting by route and feature while dropping dead rules. Conditional loading is the real performance win. Style.html concatenates plugins.css from hugo.toml, so adding route-specific CSS there is straightforward. Replacing the single `@import` with multiple `@import` statements in main.css would only organize the files. Actual per-route bundle reduction still needs conditional template blocks.
</details></think>

Base and notes-content styles will always load in the main bundle. Graph, randomizer, review, and flashcard styles will load conditionally based on route.

Route-specific CSS bundles are now defined. Blog and home pages only need custom-base. The notes list needs base, notes-content, and notes-garden. Single note pages need those plus notes-graph and possibly notes-flashcards. The graph page needs base, notes-content, notes-graph, and notes-garden. Backlinks pages need base, notes-content, and notes-garden. Cards pages need base, notes-content, notes-garden, and notes-flashcards.

Review pages need base, notes-content, notes-garden, and notes-review. Randomizer pages need base and randomizer. Issues pages need base, notes-content, and notes-garden. Blog pages only need custom-base.css. Notes-garden is shared across most notes routes and is excluded from blog.

Line counts for the planned splits are being mapped. Base styles will cover roughly 213 lines. Notes content spans 214–352. Graph styles span 353–1351. Garden styles span 768–1882. Some overlap exists between garden and graph sections.

The file is interleaved. Wikilink-preview spans 1326–1351 and belongs in notes-content or notes-garden. Backlinks in notes-garden mixes with graph styles. A clean split is difficult.

Blog table rules at 321–325 remain in custom-base.css because blog pages use .content tables. The notes-content split now covers lines 214–352 and 1326–1351, including wikilink preview. For notes-graph.css, the graph section maps to 353–767, notes-card to 768–820, and backlinks to 831–1173.

Graph styles are now mapped to 353–767, 1204–1300, and 1302–1324. Garden styles cover 768–1173 and 1326–1882, including wikilink-preview. Flashcards, review, and randomizer styles are assigned to 1883–1999, 2001–2052, and 2054 onward. Graph CSS variables from :root remain in custom-base.css.

Filter focus rings will stay in custom-base.css. The plan is to implement route-conditional loading rather than importing everything in main.css. I will create the split CSS files in assets/css/ and update main.css to only import base styles by default.

Route CSS must live outside the main.css concat bundle. It will be injected via a new partial in style.html. Conditional loading uses resources.Get to pull in split files like notes-content.css only when a route matches.

The split CSS files are plain CSS without @apply directives, so they can be appended directly to the $styles slice in style.html and concatenated with the Tailwind output. This avoids piping them through css.TailwindCSS separately.

The conditional loading logic is now fully specified. Notes pages append notes-graph.css for graph layouts, notes-flashcards.css for cards layouts, and notes-review.css for review layouts. The randomizer layout loads randomizer.css. python3 << 'PY'
from pathlib import Path

src = Path("/home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com/assets/css/custom.css")
lines = src.read_text().splitlines(keepends=True)

def slice_lines(ranges):
    out = []
    for start, end in ranges:
        out.extend(lines[start-1:end])
    return "".join(out)

files = {
    "custom-base.css": [(1, 213)],
    "notes-content.css": [(214, 352)],
    "notes-graph.css": [(353, 767), (1204, 1324)],
    "notes-garden.css": [(768, 1203), (1326, 1882)],
    "notes-flashcards.css": [(1883, 1999)],
    "notes-review.css": [(2001, 2052)],
    "randomizer.css": [(2054, len(lines))],
}

# verify coverage
covered = set()
for ranges in files.values():
    for start, end in ranges:
        covered.update(range(start, end + 1))
missing = [i for i in range(1, len(lines)+1) if i not in covered]
if missing:
  raise SystemExit(f"uncovered lines: {missing[:20]} ... total {len(missing)}")

base = Path("/home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com/assets/css")
for name, ranges in files.items():
    p = base / name
    p.write_text(slice_lines(ranges))
    print(f"{name}: {sum(e-s+1 for s,e in ranges)} lines")

print(f"total source: {len(lines)}")
PY

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && for page in public/index.html public/notes/index.html public/notes/grace/index.html public/notes/graph/index.html public/notes/cards/index.html public/notes/review/index.html public/randomizer/index.html public/blog/index.html; do
  if [ -f "$page" ]; then
  css=$(grep -oP 'href="\K[^"]*style[^"]*\.css' "$page" | head -1)
  size=$(wc -c < "public${css}" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  printf "%6d  %s\n" "$size" "$page"
  fi
done
```
